name: Shredded Brussels Sprouts
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl of cold, salted water, soak brussels sprouts for 10 minutes.
2. Drain; trim ends and discard any bitter outside leaves.
3. Cut each sprout in half lengthwise; thinly slice crosswise.
4. In a large skillet, melt butter over medium-high heat.
5. Add sprouts, salt, and pepper; sauté 5 minutes or until sprouts start to brown.
6. Add water; cook, stirring 2 to 3 minutes, until sprouts are crisp-tender.
7. Stir in lime juice.
